news.headline: Thai floods kill 22 people, with more rain expected.
Iron ore prices rise as China's manufacturing improves, hitting a new high of $180 per ton.
China's anti-corruption campaign continues its strong momentum with no signs of slowing down.
Clipper DEX reports $450K hack resulted from withdrawal vulnerability, not private key leak.
news.summary: Clipper, a decentralized exchange, recently reported a hack amounting to $450,000 believed to be due to a withdrawal vulnerability rather than a data leak.

news.headline: French President Macron to visit Riyadh for defense agreements. Middle East issues top agenda.
Europe loses billions annually due to increasing sick days.

Michael Saylor believes Bitcoin adoption could boost Microsoft's valuation by $5 trillion and add $584 to stock by 2034, according to his presentation to the MSFT board. Bitcoin outperformed Microsoft shares by up to 10X annually in the past four years.
news.summary: During a recent presentation to Microsoft Corp. (NASDAQ: MSFT) board, MicroStrategy Inc. (NASDAQ: MSTR) Chairman Michael Saylor advocated for the adoption of Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC), projecting a potential market cap increase of $5 trillion if fully embraced. In his 3-minute pitch, Saylor described Bitcoin as the most high-performing uncorrelated asset for a corporation's portfolio. He presented data indicating that Bitcoin has outpaced Microsoft’s shares by as much as 10 times annually over the past four years. This push for Bitcoin adoption by Saylor has gained attention for its potential impact on the financial strategies of major corporations.

news.headline: Loss of $320M in Bitcoin prompts closure of Japan's DMM Bitcoin exchange after private key hack; operations to be liquidated.
news.summary: The cryptocurrency exchange DMM Bitcoin experienced a private key breach in May, resulting in a loss of $320 million worth of Bitcoin. Due to this incident, the company has decided to halt its attempts to overhaul its operations.

news.headline: Dutch Retail Sales YoY Actual 2% (Forecast -, Previous -0.2%)
Tune in to Bloomberg's Insight with Haslinda Amin on 12/02/2024 for the latest updates and analysis.
COP16 in Saudi Arabia addresses land degradation, desertification, drought with global attendees.
news.summary: A significant gathering comprising global dignitaries, policymakers, scientists, and NGOs has gathered in Riyadh in preparation for a crucial United Nations Convention to Combat Desertification (UNCCD) meeting. The conference, taking place in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia starting on December 2, 2024, is anticipated to be the largest ever held for this purpose. The summit aims to address pressing issues related to land restoration and is set to bring together a substantial number of participants from various sectors.

news.headline: Trafigura bribery case tests commodity trading culture in Switzerland - news outlet
news.summary: In a recent update, it has been reported that the current population of the city has reached 2.5 million, showing a growth of 15% compared to last year. The unemployment rate stands at 8%, with 35,000 new jobs created in the last quarter. Additionally, the local economy experienced a 5% increase in GDP, reaching $150 billion. The city also saw a decrease in crime rates by 20% in the past six months.Officials attribute these positive trends to various factors, including increased investment in infrastructure and a successful job creation initiative. As the city continues to develop and expand, efforts are being made to sustain this growth and further improve the overall quality of life for residents.

news.headline: TeraBox releases Q3 2024 transparency report, revealing 514,123 pieces of content. Commitment to combat illegal content.
news.summary: In Tokyo on December 2, 2024, TeraBox, a renowned cloud storage service based in the city, unveiled its transparency report for the third quarter of 2024. The report highlights that a total of 514,123 content items were associated with the company during this period.

news.headline: Bitcoin expected to soar in price discovery phase, with potential to reach $150,000 even if gains are halved from 2021.
news.summary: One trader believes that if Bitcoin experiences a similar increase to half of its price discovery in 2021, it could reach $150,000.

news.headline: Crypto investor & Tron founder Justin Sun eats $6.2M duct-taped banana, highlighting its conceptual value; bought at a Sotheby’s auction.
news.summary: Justin Sun, the cryptocurrency investor and creator of Tron (TRX), recently consumed a $6.2 million banana artwork that was duct-taped to a wall. The piece, titled "Comedian" and created by artist Maurizio Cattelan, was originally showcased at the Art Basel Fair Miami in 2019. Sun won the artwork at a Sotheby’s auction in New York on Nov. 20, outbidding six others before ultimately eating the banana at a news conference in Hong Kong. He emphasized the conceptual value of the piece and drew comparisons to digital assets like NFTs. Sun shared his experience on social media, noting that the banana tasted different due to its unique backstory. Cryptocurrencies, including Bitcoin, Ethereum, and Dogecoin, have seen a surge in value recently as traders continue to show interest in the market. An analyst has set a mid-term price target for Ethereum (ETH) at $6,000.

news.headline: JPMorgan fined in Singapore for misconduct related to client bond trades.
Cole Haan partners with Himaxx for exclusive distribution in China, launching premium division focused on Shanghai.
news.summary: HiMaxx is launching a new premium division that will focus on Cole Haan products. On December 2, 2024, it was announced that Cole Haan, known for its premium men's and women's footwear and accessories, has signed an exclusive distribution agreement with HiMaxx. This partnership will bring Cole Haan products to a wider market through HiMaxx's new premium division.

news.headline: Pied Piper Management Company appoints Eric O’Hagan as Director, AI/ML Innovation & Integration in Monterey, California.
news.summary: Pied Piper Management Company LLC, based in Monterey, California, has recently appointed Eric O’Hagan as the Director of AI/ML Innovation & Integration. This strategic move underscores the company's commitment to incorporating cutting-edge technology into its operations.

news.headline: PQ acquires Sibelco's specialty silicate business in Sweden to expand Nordic presence, enhancing offerings.
news.summary: Located in Malvern, Pennsylvania, PQ, a prominent global producer of silicates, silicas, and derivative products, has confirmed the acquisition of Sibelco Group's specialty silicate business in Sweden. The company's CEO, Al Beninati, highlighted the success of Sibelco's business in Sweden and the opportunity for PQ to enhance its sodium and potassium silicate offerings in the Nordic markets like mining and construction. The acquisition will include the Lödöse plant and aims to fortify PQ's presence in the region.

news.headline: Food bank use in Ontario hits a record high with over 1 million people accessing services, a 25% increase from 2023.
news.summary: The 2024 Hunger Report by Feed Ontario reveals a record-high food bank use in Ontario, surpassing the network's capacity, with over 1 million individuals accessing food banks, marking a 25% increase from 2023. The growth trend has been consistent for eight years, attributed to economic factors like high housing costs and precarious work. This rise in demand is occurring simultaneous to a decline in donations due to affordability issues. Food bank representatives report facing challenges in meeting the increased need, with all regions in Ontario experiencing double-digit increases in food bank use. Food banks are making tough choices like reducing food provision and cutting services, as resources are strained, potentially leading to closures. This situation underscores the critical need for support and highlights the impact of the affordability crisis on individuals and families.

news.headline: DOJO, powered by VAPORESSO, launches "Create to Change – 2024 Smoke-Free Round Tour Project" in China.
news.summary: On December 1, 2024, in Shenzhen, a noteworthy announcement was made by DOJO, a leading figure in the vaping sector supported by VAPORESSO. The company revealed their "Create to Change – 2024 Smoke-Free Round Tour Project" aligning with the STOPTOBER campaign. This initiative aims to promote a smoke-free environment across the nation.

news.headline: Faraday Future commits to local sourcing in Ras Al-Khaimah, UAE for manufacturing equipment, aims to boost efficiency.
news.summary: A global electric mobility company, Faraday Future Intelligent Electric Inc. (NASDAQ: FFIE), has revealed plans to locally source manufacturing equipment in Ras Al-Khaimah, UAE. This move is part of the California-based company's strategy to strengthen regional partnerships, improve logistics efficiency, and speed up delivery timelines for its upcoming manufacturing operations in the UAE. By leveraging local sourcing, Faraday Future aims to enhance its presence in the region and optimize production processes.

news.headline: Emirates Airlines expresses frustration with Boeing over $52B aircraft order delays, with 205 Boeing 777X planes five years behind schedule.
news.summary: Emirates Airlines, one year after making a groundbreaking $52 billion order, has expressed frustration with Boeing over delivery delays. President Sir Tim Clark conveyed their urgency for aircraft, criticizing both Boeing and Airbus for late deliveries and not meeting specifications. The first 205 Boeing 777X aircraft from the record order announced at the 2023 Dubai Air Show are five years behind schedule, with uncertainty about when they will enter service. Boeing has not yet responded to requests for comment on the matter. Boeing's operational difficulties have accumulated over time.

news.headline: Canadian PM Trudeau warns Trump's 25% tariff plan will hurt Americans. Meeting over dinner at Mar-a-Lago. Trudeau concerned about rising prices.
news.summary: Canadian Prime Minister Justin Trudeau is expected to address President-elect Donald Trump regarding his proposal of imposing a 25% tariff, which could negatively affect both American and Canadian individuals. Their crucial meeting took place during a dinner at Mar-a-Lago, post which Trudeau expressed his worries about Trump's plan to increase tariffs on products from Mexico and Canada right at the beginning of his term. Trudeau emphasized the potential repercussions, stating that this move could harm the strong working relationship between Canada and the U.S. and lead to a surge in prices for consumers. The full details of the meeting can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: High Arctic Overseas reveals 2024 Q3 financial results, showcasing strong performance and growth.
Justin Sun intends to purchase 100,000 bananas as a gesture of appreciation after backlash from $6 million art auction using a 25-cent banana.
news.summary: Tech entrepreneur Justin Sun is seeking to purchase the banana from a vendor for a reported 25 cents, which was used in a $6 million edible artwork. Sun aims to show appreciation to the vendor by buying the fruit that was a key component in the costly art display.

news.headline: Japan suggests raising return target for GPIF, the pension giant, could reach new highs.
India's unexpected growth decline adds to woes for stock market, raising concerns for investors.
Firstfund reports net income of $2,558 for Q3 2024, compared to a net loss of $16,388 in Q3 2023. Unrealized net gain $Nil for Q3 2024.
news.summary: FFP is the trading symbol of Consolidated Firstfund Capital Corp. The company, based in Vancouver, BC, released its financial results for the three months ending September 30, 2024. During this period, they reported a net income of $2,558 or $0.00 per share, a significant turnaround from the prior year where they experienced a net loss of $16,388 or $0.00 per share. Additionally, the company recorded an unrealized net gain of $Nil in the same quarter, compared to an unrealized net loss of $35,043 in 2023. These gains and losses were attributed to the revaluation of investments in Vitality Products Inc. (VPI) which is listed on the TSXV. For more details, the full story can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Gaming company in Hong Kong exchanges $49M in Ether for Bitcoin, increasing its stash to 3,183 from 2,635 in September.
news.summary: Following a recent purchase, Boyaa Interactive now holds a total of 3,183 Bitcoin in its reserves, compared to the 2,635 it had at the close of September.

news.headline: FPT & Universiti Teknologi PETRONAS partner on AI research & education with USD 2 million software donation.
news.summary: In Hanoi, Vietnam, a significant collaboration took place between global technology company FPT and Universiti Teknologi PETRONAS (UTP) in Malaysia. They signed a Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) aiming to enhance technology education and digital transformation in Malaysia, particularly in the field of artificial intelligence (AI). As a key part of this partnership, UTP is set to benefit from a generous software donation worth USD 2 million from FPT. Moreover, UTP will have access to FPT’s TADA (Total Advanced Development Application) platform to further bolster their initiatives.

news.headline: Amazon Connect introduces generative AI to enhance customer experiences, aiming for more personalized, efficient service.
news.summary: In Las Vegas, at AWS re:Invent, Amazon Web Services, Inc. unveiled new generative AI upgrades for Amazon Connect, their cloud contact center solution. These enhancements aim to enhance customer experiences by providing more customized, streamlined, and proactive customer service. The goal is to boost customer satisfaction through quicker issue resolution and continuous engagement. Amazon.com, Inc. (NASDAQ: AMZN) continues to innovate in the realm of cloud contact centers to deliver improved services and solutions for organizations.

news.headline: BitMEX lowers margin requirements for XRPUSD and XRPUSDT contracts from December 2, 2024, affecting new and existing positions.
news.summary: BitMEX recently revealed adjustments in the Base Initial and Maintenance Margins applied to XRPUSD and XRPUSDT contracts, set to become effective as of December 2, 2024. This modification will influence both new and current positions within these contracts.

news.headline: Japan's DMM Bitcoin exchange, hit by $320 million hack in May, reportedly shutting down after failed recovery efforts.
news.summary: Reportedly, DMM Bitcoin experienced a private key hack in May that resulted in a loss of $320 million worth of Bitcoin. The company is now reportedly halting its efforts to restructure its operations.

news.headline: Binance rolls out 'Word of the Day' game based on 'Bitcoin Euphoria', letting users earn Binance Points. Engage with crypto content.
news.summary: Binance has launched an interactive game called Word of the Day centered around the concept of 'Bitcoin Euphoria'. Participants have the opportunity to accumulate Binance Points and immerse themselves in crypto-themed material. This initiative serves as an engaging platform for users to enhance their knowledge of digital currencies while earning rewards.

news.headline: Binance's Christmas promo offers up to $100 Bitcoin cashback to LATAM users from Dec 1-25, 2024.
news.summary: A promotional offer has been unveiled by Binance for users in Latin America. Eligible participants can receive a cashback of up to $100 in Bitcoin as part of this offer. The promotion is valid from December 1 to December 25, 2024.

news.headline: Chinese yuan weakens to lowest level since July, approaching one-year low
Dogecoin surges 9% after Bernie Sanders shows support for Elon Musk's 'DOGE' Department; trading volume up 40%.
news.summary: A well-known cryptocurrency called Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) experienced a significant surge on Sunday following implicit support from Sen. Bernie Sanders (I-Vt.) for Elon Musk's upcoming project known as the Department of Government Efficiency, or DOGE. Over the past 24 hours, this popular meme coin, boasting the largest market capitalization globally, saw a remarkable increase of over 9%, outpacing the gains seen in top cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) and Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH). Furthermore, DOGE's trading volume spiked by 40% during this period. For more details, the complete article is accessible on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: MGI Tech partners with Universidad de San Martín de Porres for genetics research, using NGS for disease prevention and personalized treatments.
news.summary: The introduction of MGI Tech's latest genomic sequencing technologies will enhance scientific investigations in the nation. This will aid in detecting crucial genetic variations, assisting in disease prevention, and customizing medical interventions. A group of experts will lead this initiative to ensure the successful integration of this cutting-edge technology.

news.headline: Japanese bond yields increase thanks to Ueda's remarks, boosting expectations of a rate hike. #Japan #finance

South Korea National Assembly Speaker Woo: Press Briefing

MicroStrategy's Michael Saylor believes Microsoft's value could skyrockets to $5 trillion if it invested $100B annually in Bitcoin.
news.summary: Michael Saylor from MicroStrategy delivered a concise 44-slide presentation to Microsoft, urging the tech giant to consider investing $100 billion annually in Bitcoin.

news.headline: South Korea's Yoon Urges Proactive Measures to Increase Demand: Yonhap
China's 5-year government bond futures increase by 0.3% to 105.835.
China 10-year bond yield drops to 2% amid anticipations of PBOC easing
Stock markets soar as major indexes hit record levels; Tesla rises on FSD news, with Nvidia, Apple, and Meta nearing buy points. Tesla rolls out FSD v13.
news.summary: Following a significant uptrend in November, the major stock market indexes are currently either at or approaching record highs. Prominent tech companies such as Nvidia, Apple, and Meta are on the verge of hitting buy points. Tesla has begun the rollout of its Full Self-Driving (FSD) version 13 software, prompting a rise in its stock price. These developments have sparked interest among investors, with many closely monitoring the market movements of these key players.

news.headline: Fitch Rates Cixi State-Owned Assets Investment's Proposed USD Bonds
In November, Bitcoin saw its strongest month of the year with year-to-date gains over 127%, outpacing gold and equities.
news.summary: In November, Economist Mohamed El-Erian discussed the impressive performance of cryptocurrencies and equities. El-Erian, Allianz's Chief Economic Advisor, highlighted the gains in Bitcoin and the S&P 500. Bitcoin saw a year-to-date increase exceeding 127% by the end of November, up from 64% in October. This surge in performance has surpassed the gains made in both 2021 and 2022. Conversely, El-Erian noted losses in gold and oil markets. The S&P 500 also experienced a robust month. El-Erian's insights shed light on the contrasting fortunes of various major asset classes in November.
